sql_array: CREATE TABLE publications (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), data NUMERIC(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP NULL);
INSERT INTO publications VALUES (1, 'demo-publication', 10.123456789, NOW()), (2, 'test-publication', NULL, NOW());
CREATE TABLE subscribers (id INT, pub_id INT, status VARCHAR(50), last_update TIMESTAMP NULL);
INSERT INTO subscribers VALUES (1, 1, 'active', NOW()), (2, 2, NULL, NOW());
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_UNPUBLISH( (SELECT name FROM publications WHERE id = 1) ) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE pub_id = 1);
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_UNPUBLISH('demo-publication') FROM publications WHERE data > (SELECT AVG(data) FROM publications) HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE status IS NULL OR pub_id = (SELECT id FROM publications WHERE name = (SELECT MAX(name) FROM publications));
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_UNPUBLISH((SELECT MIN(name) FROM publications WHERE name IS NOT NULL) || CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(10))) / NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_UNPUBLISH('demo-publication') * (SELECT SUM(data) FROM publications WHERE data IS NOT NULL) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active');
CREATE TABLE temp_subscribers AS SELECT * FROM subscribers WHERE last_update IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DB.DBA.REPL_UNPUBLISH('test-publication') - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_subscribers WHERE id IS NOT NULL);
